title: NoctisWraith
description: Essential Quality of Life features for Minecraft: Fast building, perfect vision v alpha, and smart stats.
body:
🌑 Noctis Wraith | Reborn

Noctis Wraith is a high-performance, lightweight Quality of Life (QoL) utility engine for Fabric. It focuses on efficiency, a clean aesthetic, and a "legit" gameplay experience.
🚀 Current Features (Alpha 2)
🛠 Automation

    Safe FastPlace: Build structures instantly without ghost blocks.

    AutoTool: Automatically selects the most efficient tool for the job.

    NoWeather: Disables rain and thunder for better visibility and FPS.

    AutoSprint: Constant sprinting for faster travel.

📊 Professional HUD

    Adaptive Bars: Custom HP, Hunger, and Armor bars (automatically hidden in Creative).

    ArrayList: A sleek list of active modules in the corner.

    Resource Trackers: Real-time counters for FPS, Rockets, and Free Slots.

🛡 Survival Tools

    Elytra Alert: Bold warning when your Elytra is about to break.

    Armor Monitor: Tracks durability to prevent gear loss.

⌨️ Command Interface

Prefix your commands with a dot (.)
Command	Action
.fp	Toggle FastPlace
.at	Toggle AutoTool
.weather	Toggle NoWeather
.hud	Toggle Noctis Interface
.help	Show all available commands
🔄 Changelog & Updates
v2.0-ALPHA (Current)

    Reborn Update: Complete engine overhaul.

    Added Adaptive HUD & Status Bars.

    Fixed FastPlace crashes.

    Added NoWeather and Elytra Alerts.

🌑 Technical Info

    Platform: Fabric API

    Version: 1.21.11

    Developer: Morivis
